configImprovements.title: Adaptive Polling Frequency
configImprovements.rationale: Slightly decreasing the interval to capture more granular system metrics during high-activity periods.
configImprovements.expectedImpact: Improves responsiveness to workload spikes and gathers finer data points.

policyChanges.title: Stricter Retry Policy for Rate Limits
policyChanges.change: Increase exponential backoff multiplier from 1.5 to 2.0
policyChanges.rationale: Prevents aggressive retries when LLM providers throw 429 Too Many Requests errors.

routingChanges.rationale: Gemini exhibits strong reasoning capabilities and aligns well with context-heavy coding tasks.

suggestions.title: Adaptive Polling Frequency
suggestions.summary: selfOptimization.intervalMs -> 600000. Improves responsiveness to workload spikes and gathers finer data points.

suggestions.title: Stricter Retry Policy for Rate Limits
suggestions.summary: Increase exponential backoff multiplier from 1.5 to 2.0 (low). Prevents aggressive retries when LLM providers throw 429 Too Many Requests errors.

suggestions.title: Routing for code-generation
suggestions.summary: Prefer gemini (confidence 95%). Gemini exhibits strong reasoning capabilities and aligns well with context-heavy coding tasks.
